title: Mercury Official Bank Note & Document Checker, Detect Fake Currency using Ultraviolet Light
features: Detects fake polymer & paper bank notes - Shows all hidden ultraviolet features
Perfect for high volume cash handling environments
Easy to change 4W UV Bulb - Simply twist and pull, no screws to remove
description: From the manufacturer DETECTS FAKE POLYMER & PAPER BANK NOTES - REVEAL ALL HIDDEN ULTRAVIOLET FEATURES PERFECT FOR HIGH VOLUME CASH HANDLING ENVIRONMENTS UK PLUG, MAINS POWERED, NO BATTERIES REQUIRED Mercury | Official Bank Note & Document Checker, Detect Fake Currency using Ultraviolet Light Remove any risk of being fooled or out of pocket by fake documents and currency. Simply check bank notes, passports, bank cards, driving licences & much more for their UV markings and confirm they are legitimate. Simple and quick, within the matter of seconds, and without disturbing any transaction between yourself and customer. PRODUCT FEATURES: Verify credit cards, driving license, passports and other ID forms Checks any countries notes with UV marks and confirm they are not counterfeit Mains powered (No battery required) Perfect for high volume cash handling environments Easy to change 4W UV Bulb - Simply twist and pull, no screws to remove SPECIFICATION: Power supply 230Vac, 50Hz Dimensions 165 x 127 x 64mm Weight 370g Replacement bulb - 4W F4T5 UV tube (Ref. 106.038UK) BOX CONTAINS: 1 x Official bank note checker
